meta.summary: KofamScan 1.3.0 runtime for KEGG Orthology assignment with user-provided KOfam HMM profiles and ko_list files.
meta.description: KofamScan 1.3.0 runtime for KEGG Orthology assignment with user-provided KOfam HMM profiles and ko_list files.

test: exec_annotation --version | grep -Fx 'exec_annotation 1.3.0' >/dev/null && exec_annotation --help | grep -F 'FASTA formatted query sequence file' >/dev/null && ruby -I/opt/kofam_scan/lib -e 'require "kofam_scan"; abort unless KofamScan::VERSION == "1.3.0"'

parallel --version | grep -F 'GNU parallel' >/dev/null && hmmsearch -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && hmmbuild -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && hmmpress -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke && exec_annotation -p /opt/kofam_scan/test-fixtures/profiles/smoke.hal -k /opt/kofam_scan/test-fixtures/ko_list --tmp-dir /tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke/tmp --cpu 1 -f mapper -o /tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke/result.tsv /opt/kofam_scan/test-fixtures/query.fa >/tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && test -s /tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke/result.tsv && grep -F 'smoke_gene' /tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke/result.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'K99999' /tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke/result.tsv >/dev/null && test -s /tmp/taf-kofamscan-smoke/tmp/tabular/tabular.txt

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-kofamscan-align && exec_annotation -p /opt/kofam_scan/test-fixtures/profiles -k /opt/kofam_scan/test-fixtures/ko_list --tmp-dir /tmp/taf-kofamscan-align/tmp --cpu 1 --create-alignment --keep-output -f detail-tsv -o /tmp/taf-kofamscan-align/result.tsv /opt/kofam_scan/test-fixtures/query.fa >/tmp/taf-kofamscan-align/run.log 2>&1 && test -s /tmp/taf-kofamscan-align/result.tsv && grep -F 'K99999' /tmp/taf-kofamscan-align/result.tsv >/dev/null && test -s /tmp/taf-kofamscan-align/tmp/alignment/smoke_gene && test -s /tmp/taf-kofamscan-align/tmp/output/K99999
